violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use the slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Pasta was portioned and placed in the freezer at the time of inspection to finish cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is not to be used until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. The can opener was moved to dishwasher at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwashers were 0-25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Per PIC, establishment will call service for dishwashers and 3-bay sink sanitizing dispenser. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Soup and chowder were observed held between 110-120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, food was placed in hot hold units 1 hour prior to inspection. Food was reheated to over 165 DF and placed back in working hot hold units at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Various food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Dates were placed on food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Per PIC, menus are being re-printed and will disclose the foods that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
Steak was observed vacuum packaged in the walk-in freezer. Establishment is to stop using ROP packaging until they have approval from RIDOH. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

ROP crab meat was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. Crab meat was observed at 36 DF and was taken completely out of the package at the time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink and bar dishwashers. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

An employee was observed eating in the kitchen area. An EMPLOYEE shall eat, drink, or use any form of tobacco only in designated areas where the contamination of exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES; or other items needing protection can not result Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pickle container) were observed with green and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Cheese, deli meat, breaded chicken and cut tomatoes were observed held at 47-56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Pasta was observed with a 5/23 date mark which exceeds 7 days. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

At the time of inspection, ROP salmon was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed to be 41 degrees farenheit, PIC voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024

Tomatoes were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2024
Refrigerator #1 and #2 door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
At the time of inspection, ambient of prep unit was at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC called for service. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The hoods/ventilation have an accumulation of dust, grease and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bar cooler have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
